module relaxed_dot_product.0.wasm
assert_return i16x8.relaxed_dot_i8x16_i7x16_s v128:000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f v128:000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f -> v128:01000d00290055009100dd003901a501
assert_return i16x8.relaxed_dot_i8x16_i7x16_s v128:80807f7f000000000000000000000000 v128:7f7f7f7f000000000000000000000000 -> v128:0081027e000000000000000000000000
assert_return i16x8.relaxed_dot_i8x16_i7x16_s v128:80800000000000000000000000000000 v128:81810000000000000000000000000000 -> either:v128:00800000000000000000000000000000|v128:007f0000000000000000000000000000|v128:00810000000000000000000000000000
assert_return i32x4.relaxed_dot_i8x16_i7x16_add_s v128:000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f v128:000102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f v128:00000000010000000200000003000000 -> v128:0e0000007f00000070010000e1020000
assert_return i32x4.relaxed_dot_i8x16_i7x16_add_s v128:808080807f7f7f7f0000000000000000 v128:7f7f7f7f7f7f7f7f0000000000000000 v128:01000000020000000300000004000000 -> v128:0102ffff06fc00000300000004000000
assert_return i32x4.relaxed_dot_i8x16_i7x16_add_s v128:80808080000000000000000000000000 v128:81818181000000000000000000000000 v128:01000000020000000300000004000000 -> either:v128:01fefeff020000000300000004000000|v128:0100ffff020000000300000004000000|v128:01fe0000020000000300000004000000|v128:01020100020000000300000004000000
assert_return i16x8.relaxed_dot_i8x16_i7x16_s_cmp v128:80807f7f000000000000000000000000 v128:7f7f7f7f000000000000000000000000 -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
assert_return i32x4.relaxed_dot_i8x16_i7x16_add_s_cmp v128:808080807f7f7f7f0000000000000000 v128:7f7f7f7f7f7f7f7f0000000000000000 v128:01000000020000000300000004000000 -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
assert_return i16x8.relaxed_dot_i8x16_i7x16_s_cmp v128:80800000000000000000000000000000 v128:81810000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
assert_return i32x4.relaxed_dot_i8x16_i7x16_add_s_cmp v128:80808080000000000000000000000000 v128:81818181000000000000000000000000 v128:01000000020000000300000004000000 -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
